description_long: This is a modern, low-profile cabinet or media console with a rectangular shape and a clean, minimalist design. The front features four wide drawers with a light-colored finish, flanking three open central shelves suitable for electronics or display items. The top and sides are finished in a natural wood tone, providing a subtle contrast to the white drawer fronts. The back view reveals an open structure, likely for cable management and ventilation, with visible shelf supports and no rear panel. The cabinet sits directly on the ground without visible legs or a base, emphasizing its streamlined appearance. Its construction suggests it is designed for use in living rooms, offices, or urban public spaces where storage and display are needed.
description: A modern, low-profile cabinet with four drawers and three open central shelves, featuring a wood and white finish. The design is minimalist and functional, suitable for storage and display in urban environments.
description_view_0: Side view showing a plain, solid wood panel with no visible features.
description_view_1: Front view displaying four drawers and three open central shelves, with contrasting wood and white finishes.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, identical to view 0, showing a plain, solid wood panel.
description_view_3: Rear view revealing open shelving and internal supports, with no back panel or drawers visible.
